context: Tests whether the agent correctly bootstraps a WooCommerce plugin with the proper header, safety guards, and WooCommerce dependency check, declares HPOS compatibility, uses the correct initialization hook, hooks into the order lifecycle, and accesses order data using HPOS-safe CRUD methods.

checklist.name: Plugin header Requires Plugins
checklist.description: Plugin header comment includes 'Requires Plugins: woocommerce' declaration

checklist.name: ABSPATH guard
checklist.description: PHP file contains 'defined("ABSPATH") || exit' (or equivalent) to prevent direct access

checklist.name: WooCommerce active check
checklist.description: Plugin checks whether WooCommerce is active using in_array with apply_filters('active_plugins', get_option('active_plugins')) before executing plugin logic

checklist.name: HPOS compatibility declaration
checklist.description: Plugin declares HPOS compatibility using FeaturesUtil::declare_compatibility('custom_order_tables', __FILE__, true) inside a 'before_woocommerce_init' action

checklist.name: woocommerce_loaded init hook
checklist.description: Plugin initializes its main class or includes files using the 'woocommerce_loaded' action (NOT 'plugins_loaded')

checklist.name: Order lifecycle hook used
checklist.description: Plugin hooks into at least one of: woocommerce_order_status_completed, woocommerce_order_status_changed, woocommerce_payment_complete, or woocommerce_checkout_order_created

checklist.name: HPOS-compatible meta write
checklist.description: Plugin writes order metadata using $order->update_meta_data() followed by $order->save(), NOT update_post_meta()

checklist.name: HPOS-compatible meta read
checklist.description: Plugin reads order metadata using $order->get_meta(), NOT get_post_meta()

checklist.name: CRUD method for order data
checklist.description: Order totals or fields are read via WooCommerce CRUD methods such as $order->get_total(), $order->get_status(), or $order->get_items() rather than raw database access

checklist.name: Namespaced meta key
checklist.description: All custom meta keys stored on orders are prefixed with a plugin-specific slug (e.g., '_myplugin_' or '_myprefix_'), not generic names like '_status' or '_value'

checklist.name: Input sanitization
checklist.description: Any user-supplied input (e.g., POST data, request parameters) is sanitized with sanitize_text_field() or equivalent before use
